comment: 95 Drifella2 (LSW) creatures from the 2026-06-21 asset-lab overnight run. REVIEW-ONLY (approvedForOverworld=false, runtimePromotion off). NOT yet wired to game entities. Each creature keeps its battle sprite paired with its overworld sprite (ow-001-nearest canonical; overworldAlt=ow-002). Paths are relative to the swagbound-new repo. To ship: assign each creature an `entity` (enemyId for battle via byEnemyId, and/or spriteGroup/npcId for overworld via bySpriteGroup/byNpcId), copy the files into coilsnake assets, and add the override entries.

assignment.method: creatures sorted by token asc -> raw ambient/named NPC groups sorted by usedByNpcCount desc; index-paired. Phones 167/215/216 excluded. 0 unskinned enemies so battle sprites stay in roster (source paths).

unicornioSwap.note: replaced the leftover unicornio character skins (vendor-unicorns) with reserve Drifella2 creatures
